title: Crispy Buttery Chestnut Stir-fry
description: A show-off American dish featuring crispy and buttery chestnuts in a savory stir-fry that is keto-friendly.

ingredients.name: Egg Whites
ingredients.notes: Use room temperature for best results.

instructions: Wrap chestnuts in aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes until soft.
While chestnuts are baking, peel garlic cloves and lightly press them with the back of a knife to create an even smaller size.
Beat egg whites until fluffy using an electric mixer or whisk. Set aside.
Add oil into a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. When oil is hot, add garlic and red pepper flakes.
Add beaten egg whites and mix quickly for about 30 seconds to form ribbons.
Stir in chestnuts and sesame seeds, tossing well until coated with the egg mixture.
Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for another minute. Serve immediately.
